title: The Reason Why Those Muslims Who Moved from al -Mada'in to al-Kufah Did So, and the Reason for Their Planning of alKufah, According to Sayf
description: al-Mada 'in to al-Kufah Did So, and the Reason for Their Planning of al-Kufah, According to Sayf According to al-Sari-Shu 'ayb-Sayf-Mubammad, Talhah, alMuhallab, 'Amr and Said: After the conquest of jalula' and Hulwan, after al-Qa'ga' b. 'Amr's settling in the latter with his men, after the conquest of Takrit and the twin fortresses (i.e., Ninawa

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
